title: Xtra Crisp American Lasagne Sheets Lasagna
description: A malty, crisp, post-workout American dish featuring lasagne sheets, this lacto-vegetarian-friendly lasagna is perfect for a satisfying dinner, served in a tagliere vessel.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and blanch the lasagne sheets for 30 seconds.
In a large bowl, combine the ricotta cheese, malted milk powder, and a pinch of salt.
Spread a layer of marinara sauce in the bottom of a tagliere vessel.
Arrange 4 lasagne sheets on top of the sauce.
Spread half of the ricotta mixture over the lasagne sheets.
Sprinkle with half of the mozzarella cheese and half of the parmesan cheese.
Repeat the layers, starting with the marinara sauce, then the lasagne sheets, the remaining ricotta mixture, and finally the remaining mozzarella and parmesan cheese.
Drizzle the olive oil over the top layer of cheese.
Cover the tagliere with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and bake for an additional 10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
